originalTitle: The Verge’s annual summer ‘in’ and ‘out’ list
summary: In the AI slop-loaded, algorithm-powered modern reality, trends come and go - and the tech industry is no different. For the last few years, The Verge staff has compiled a selection of things that are IN for summer and OUT for summer - and each time there are some strong feelings. (Here are the last […]
content: In the AI slop-loaded, algorithm-powered modern reality, trends come and go — and the tech industry is no different. For the last few years, The Verge staff has compiled a selection of things that are IN for summer and OUT for summer — and each time there are some strong feelings. (Here are the last two years’ predictions.) Let’s do it again! Mia Sato, senior report Meredith Haggerty, editor Hayden Field, senior AI reporter Victoria Song, senior dystopia reviewer TC Sottek, senior editor Kevin McShane, editorial director audio/video Kevin Nguyen, deputy editor Marina Galperina, senior tech editor Gaby Del Valle, policy reporter Antonio DiBenedetto, reviewer Liz Lopatto, senior internet typist
chineseTitle: The Verge 年度夏季“流行”和“流行”榜单
chineseSummary: 在人工智能充斥、算法驱动的现代现实中，趋势来来去去——科技行业也不例外。在过去的几年里，The Verge 的工作人员精心挑选了一些夏季流行和过时的单品——每一次都会有一些强烈的感受。 （这是最后[...]
chineseContent: 在人工智能充斥、算法驱动的现代现实中，趋势来来去去——科技行业也不例外。在过去的几年里，The Verge 的工作人员精心挑选了一些夏季流行和过时的单品——每一次都会有一些强烈的感受。 （这是最近两年的预测。）让我们再做一次！ Mia Sato，高级报告 Meredith Haggerty，编辑 Hayden Field，高级人工智能记者 Victoria Song，高级反乌托邦审稿人 TC Sottek，高级编辑 Kevin McShane，音频/视频编辑总监 Kevin Nguyen，副编辑 Marina Galperina，高级技术编辑 Gaby Del Valle，政策记者 Antonio DiBenedetto，审稿人 Liz Lopatto，高级互联网打字员
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
